englishDefinitions: (formal, idiomatic) A phrase used before disagreeing with someone or saying something they may find offensive, usually considered polite.
persianTranslation: (رسمی، اصطلاحی) عبارتی که قبل از مخالفت با کسی یا گفتن چیزی که ممکن است توهین‌آمیز باشد، استفاده می‌شود که معمولاً مؤدبانه تلقی می‌شود.
examples: With all due respect, Sir, I don't think that's the case.
It seems that you are, with all due respect, wrong in this particular case — as you see the murder took place at three o'clock.
